Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Lisa Espada, Esq. appeared for petitioner Diahna Gonzales, the Guardian ad Litem for Danielle Ruiz
On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved.

Counsel to prepare a revised Order for signature.
